feat.name: Ocean Wariness
feat.text: Stories about those who have mistreated your people in the past (particularly stories about alghollthu mind control) left you untrusting of those outside your community. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your defenses against Deception, Diplomacy, Intimidation, and Performance checks.
